art_direction: Bold creative agency aesthetic with high-contrast orange energy (#ff6b35), masonry-style asymmetric grids, generous whitespace (120px sections), and pill-shaped CTAs. Components are dense, high-fidelity interfaces with 12px card radius and soft shadows. The layout emphasizes visual hierarchy through scale contrast and strategic use of the accent color.

organs.atom_style_hint: Hero-scale IR workspace with dense data table, viewBox='0 0 760 640'. Large typography, orange accent on active states, 12px radius cards, high-fidelity grid interface with Plus Jakarta Sans headers.
Floating sidebar card with power-user controls, viewBox='0 0 360 480'. Pill buttons, orange accent CTAs, compact arbiter validation interface with high density.

Full-width session control bar, viewBox='0 0 1140 400'. Horizontal layout with status indicators, pill-shaped action buttons, orange accent on primary actions, high-contrast dark elements on white ground.
Minimal nav bar, viewBox='0 0 1140 72'. Clean horizontal layout with pill-shaped logo mark, sparse navigation links, orange accent on active state.
Vertical upload panel, viewBox='0 0 380 520'. Stacked dropzone with orange dashed border, color palette picker below, high-contrast white cards with 12px radius.

Large analysis workspace, viewBox='0 0 720 680'. Dense vision interface with large analyze button, report panels, regeneration controls. High-fidelity data visualization with orange accent highlights.
Compact layout card, viewBox='0 0 360 420'. Grid preview with style selector, dense component thumbnails, orange accent on selected state.
Wide validation dashboard, viewBox='0 0 740 420'. Horizontal accordion interface, status indicators with orange for warnings/errors, high-density validation list.
Full-width adaptation stage, viewBox='0 0 1140 460'. Zoom controls with large preview zones, stenciler grid, detail cards. Cinematic horizontal layout with orange accent on primary actions.
Tall chat sidebar, viewBox='0 0 380 640'. Stacked chat bubbles with orange user accents, input field at bottom, skip action. High-fidelity messaging interface with generous padding.

Centered export stage, viewBox='0 0 820 280'. Large launch button with pill shape, code editor preview, apply changes toggle. High-contrast finale with dominant orange CTA, download and confirm actions.
